name: Ginger Apple Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the apples, grated ginger root, celery, raisins, walnuts, honey, and orange juice in a large bowl.
2. Mix until all ingredients are well combined.
3. Cover the mixture and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow flavors to meld.
4. Serve on lettuce leaves.
5. Garnish with slices of orange and mint leaves before serving.
